sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a sore throat for four days, accompanied by fever, chills, and sweating last night.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: He describes difficulty swallowing and reports swollen tonsils.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: He drinks primarily water, occasionally consuming wine.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The patient also reports a stuffy nose.
